prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-COMMUNICATOR-MICKEY-38731-HPNR Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Junior Mickey Mouse Funhouse Communicator with Lights and Sounds, by Just Play Description: Now, Disney Junior fans can give Mickey Mouse a call and put their Funhouse adventures in full swing with the Mickey Mouse Funhouse Communicator. This adorable light and sounds communicator is designed with Mickey Mouse’s iconic ears and features a lenticular Funny face screen that lights up. En route to their imaginative adventure, kids will love using the communicator to talk to Mickey Mouse. Press the button on the side to activate lights, sounds, and Mickey Mouse phrases. The communicator even slides open. Kids can slide the communicator open for an extended version and press the button for additional fun sounds and phrases. Ideal for little hands and big imaginations, the Mickey Mouse Funhouse Communicator is great for on the go fun. Requires 3 x AG13 batteries (included). Customer needs to remove item from try me mode to utilize full functions.

Ages 3+ Search Terms: Disney jr junior mickey minnie disney lights light up sounds lenticular activate learning development music noises talk phone cell phone imagination creativity speaking toddler push buttons movement Features: - Now, Disney Junior fans can give Mickey Mouse a call and put their Funhouse adventures in full swing with the Mickey Mouse Funhouse Communicator! This adorable light and sounds communicator is designed with Mickey Mouse’s iconic ears and features a lenticular Funny face screen that lights up! En route to their imaginative adventure, kids will love using the communicator to talk to Mickey Mouse! Press the button on the side to activate lights, sounds, and Mickey Mouse phrases. - Features a lenticular Funny face screen. - Press the button on the side to activate lights, sounds, and Mickey Mouse phrases. - The communicator slides open for extended play and includes additional fun sounds and phrases! - Great for on the go fun! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Mickey Mouse Funhouse Communicator with Lights

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lights And Sounds, Lenticular Screen, Slides Open, Mickey Phrases, Ages 3 Plus

openai.title_differentiation: Light Up Face Screen, Mickey Mouse Phrases, Slides Open For Extended Play, Portable Pretend Play
